hooks.command: echo 'NARRATIVE-DESIGN PROTOCOL (glassbeadgame): a grounded review artifact is required every turn. After completing this turn, invoke the narrative-designer agent (or do its review inline for a trivial turn) to: (1) analyze what was produced this turn; (2) audit it against the study materials in docs/CORPUS_GAME_DESIGN.md (knitted vs layered theme, motivated elements, degree of thematic action, conflict, player verbs); (3) write a dated artifact to docs/narrative-reviews/ following docs/narrative-reviews/TEMPLATE.md and append a line to docs/narrative-reviews/INDEX.md. Cite PDF sources by author/chapter; keep player-facing copy grounded in Hesse/Leary/RAW. Skip only if the user explicitly says no review.'
